economic_notes: Innu Development Limited Partnership (49.995% owned) is a government business enterprise providing returns from businesses located in Labrador. Total assets of IDLP: $42,444,423; total revenue: $22,872,201. Subsequent to year end, multiple fires destroyed the Council Administration Building and Training Centre (net book values $192,143 and $144,540 respectively); covered by insurance.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Province is Newfoundland and Labrador (NL). Consolidated subsidiaries include Shushepeshipan Ishpitentamun Mitshuap Inc., Sheshatshiu Tourism Inc., Innu Nikan General Store Corporation (100%), and Innu Assi Leasing Corporation (100%). One GBE: Innu Development Limited Partnership (49.995%) accounted for using modified equity method. ISC funding includes operating ($13,564,545) and capital ($6,149,684) = $19,714,229. TCA net book value not determinable from truncated Schedule 1. Deferred revenue is significant at $31.6M. Subsequent event: fires destroyed two buildings post year-end. No schedule of remuneration provided. Gain on disposal of tangible capital assets $39,211 included in annual surplus.
